featured.title: Thandie Chisi Crowned Miss Malawi 2025
featured.author: Admin
paragraphs: In a spectacular display of elegance and vision, Thandie Chisi has been crowned Miss Malawi 2025. Chisi, a sustainable fashion advocate and entrepreneur, stood out among the finalists for her clear commitment to women's empowerment and environmental conservation.

As part of her reign, Chisi plans to expand her Sustainable Fashion and Women Empowerment (SFWE) initiative, focusing on providing vocational skills to young women while promoting eco-friendly practices in Malawi's fashion industry.

articles.title: SFWE Launches 'Keep a Girl in School' Project
articles.excerpt: The Sustainable Fashion and Women Empowerment initiative, led by Miss Malawi 2025 Thandie Chisi, has launched a nationwide campaign to address menstrual poverty and ensure girls stay in school with dignity.
articles.author: SFWE Media Team

articles.title: Miss Malawi Foundation Announces New Strategic Partnerships
articles.excerpt: Thandie Chisi has established key partnerships with the National Economic Empowerment Fund (NEEF) and other organizations to support her 'Empower Her Now' tailoring project.
articles.author: Communications Team

articles.title: Jescar Mponda Completes Impactful Reign
articles.excerpt: Jescar Mponda, Miss Malawi 2022, has officially handed over the crown, leaving behind a legacy of girls' education advocacy and rural community support.
articles.author: Admin

articles.title: Youth Business Fair Showcases Sustainable Innovation
articles.excerpt: Miss Malawi 2025 participated in the recent Youth Business Fair, highlighting how sustainable fashion can drive climate resilience and economic growth.
articles.author: Events Coordinator
